export { isIos, isAndroid, isPad, isTVOS, Version } from './utils'
export { initSize, dp2px, px2dp } from './conversion'
export { default as SafeAreaView } from './SafeAreaView'

export {
    pixelRatio,
    originalWidth,
    originalHeight,
    deviceWidth,
    deviceHeight,
    isIPhoneX,
    ifIPhoneX,
    isHorizontal,
    ifHorizontal,
    getStatusBarHeight,
    getBottomSpace
} from './device'
